alerts.headline: AVOID: 12-for-1 reverse split effective TODAY (7/14, new CUSIP G8071C137) to hold Nasdaq $1 compliance (Rule 5550(a)(2)) -- shares/outstanding cut from 8.06M to ~672k -- layered on an AI+blockchain+crypto/stablecoin pivot pump. Corporate action desyncs ledger vs broker; not the clean insider fundamental the radar score implies. FinBERT's +0.919 is a misattributed generic 'US Stocks Edge Higher' headline -- disregard.

AVOID (correcting prior intel 'info'): concur with risk.json -- management diluted ~30% via a $50M registered direct (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE priced 6/25, CLOSED 6/26; a 7/6 F-3 registers 3,030,303 more sh for resale. Stock $1.72 sits BELOW the $1.81 offer; the CEO's $1.59 7/7 buy driving the score came AFTER the raise. Flag, not info.

Only fresh item is a 7/10 stockholder letter (strategy/WrapShield positioning), no new catalyst. Keep AVOID, do not add.

Held/top book gainer +7.2% (~$14.20 intraday); Buy consensus, avg PT ~$16. Move is already in the tape, not a fresh un-priced catalyst -- and post-lockup Lightspeed XII distribution (219,075 sh 7/9) remains a live overhang Iconiq's $7.2M 7/8 buy only partly offsets.

Held, fundamentals clean (director $990k 7/13, Caris Detect launch, $100M buyback, no dilution). No fresh news; risk.json's broker-vs-cache price drift (~3%, broker ~$17.50 vs cache $16.99) means stop math off the cache is off -- data issue, not fundamentals.

Watchlist: Equinor $1B+ backlog intact, but concur with risk.json -- the ~$5.8B all-stock Valaris deal (15.235 RIG/sh, existing holders to ~53% of combined co) now has a DOJ 'second request'; companies won't certify before 7/31, pushing earliest close to ~9/29. Material dilution + binary-vote risk the 'clean backlog' framing understates.

Candidate (5.64, below 6.25 line): insider cluster is real -- GlobalHarvest bought ~$7.9M 7/9 (atop 7/6 and 7/8 buys) and director Jay Pack ~$484k late June -- plus a $100M buyback; but Q2 rev -24% (avocado glut) and the buys already drive the score. No fresh catalyst, no boost; not a pump, info only.
